meta.title: mobiqo — an independent mobile studio
meta.description: mobiqo is an independent mobile studio building and shipping its own iOS apps to the App Store.

hero.subtitle: mobiqo is an independent studio shipping its own iOS apps to the App Store. No service list, no client roster — only products we've spent a long time getting right.

services.title: Few things, made well.
services.body: Instead of pushing out twenty rushed apps a year, we choose to build a few products we can stand behind for years. Every detail considered, every screen agreed on, every line of code our own. No investor pressure, no KPI charts to chase — just the product itself.

items.title: Independent
items.desc: No investors, no outside owners. We make every decision in favor of the product and its users.

items.title: User-first
items.desc: We use everything we ship. We don't release apps we wouldn't open ourselves.

items.title: Long-term
items.desc: Launch is a starting point, not an end. Our products mature over months and years.

process.title: Think, build, listen.
process.subtitle: Three repeating steps. No marketing language, no clever-sounding 'framework'.

steps.title: Think
steps.desc: A problem, a niche, a curiosity. We write down what and why before we touch any code.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Swift, SwiftUI, TestFlight. Light builds, fast iteration, design true to Apple's platform.

steps.title: Listen
steps.desc: App Store reviews, user emails, our own daily use. Feedback is the other half of the product.

capabilities.title: What we work with.
capabilities.subtitle: Modern, simple, proven. We follow the right thing instead of the latest one.

about.title: A small studio with a clear goal.
about.body_1: mobiqo is an independent software studio building and publishing its own mobile products on the App Store. Based in Türkiye, run by a small team.
about.body_2: We have no growth pressure or sales targets to hit. The only thing that drives us is making iOS apps people genuinely want to use, and that last.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Less but right. Every screen serves a purpose.

values.title: Performance
values.desc: Fast, fluid and reliable. Users hate waiting — so do we.

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Beautiful gets used. Design matters as much as the product itself.

values.title: Longevity
values.desc: Our products live as long as they're used, not just until ship day.

items.q: Do you take on client work?
items.a: No. mobiqo is an independent studio — we only build our own products. No service list, no work for hire.
Focusing on a single platform keeps both the quality bar and our own learning curve high. We'll consider Android only when we know we can do it well.
No. mobiqo runs on its own revenue, not outside capital — a slow but free model.
Not at the moment. When we open the team in the future, we'll announce it here.

items.q: Where can I download your apps?
items.a: We'll list our App Store pages here soon. In the meantime, write to us via the form below if you'd like to hear when they ship.

items.q: How can I get in touch?
items.a: The form below, or hello@mobiqo.app. Feedback, press, partnerships — all welcome.

contact.title: Drop us a line.
contact.subtitle: Feedback, press, partnerships, or just a hello — write, we'll reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.message_placeholder: What would you like to share?
form.success_body: Your message reached us. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error_body: We couldn't process your message right now. You can email us directly:
